evals.prompt: Сделай полный AEO аудит для сайта icoda.io и создай PDF отчёт. Нужно проверить доступность для AI ботов, структурированные данные, контент и технические аспекты.
evals.expected_output: Full AI visibility audit of icoda.io with: (1) 4 HTTP fetches performed (robots.txt, homepage, sitemap.xml, llms.txt), (2) scores calculated for all 4 categories using correct weights, (3) overall score 0-100, (4) HTML report artifact generated with proper color-coded design, score gauge, bot table, technical checklist, recommendations. Response in Russian.

evals.prompt: Check the AI visibility of stripe.com — I want to know if ChatGPT and Perplexity can find and index it. Give me a full AEO audit with a downloadable report.
evals.expected_output: Full AI visibility audit of stripe.com with: (1) 4 HTTP fetches performed, (2) scores for all 4 categories, (3) HTML report artifact with English language, correct bot access table showing Stripe's robots.txt configuration, structured data analysis (Stripe likely has good structured data), recommendations sorted by ROI. Response in English.

evals.prompt: Проверь и сравни AI видимость двух сайтов: tinkoff.ru и sberbank.ru. Какой из них лучше оптимизирован для AI поиска? Сделай сравнительный анализ.
evals.expected_output: Comparative AI visibility audit of both tinkoff.ru and sberbank.ru: (1) Both sites analyzed with 4 fetches each, (2) scores calculated for both, (3) side-by-side comparison table in the report, (4) clear winner identified per category, (5) recommendations for the weaker site. Response in Russian.
